Roy Casimir

Person · First seen 3312-01-28 · 1 mentions
Active: 3312-01-28 → 3312-01-28
Related Entities

L
HIP 87621
Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3312-01-28
Genetic Study of Radicoida Unica Released
Dr. Roy Casimir publishes first public Radicoida unica study. Mercurial genetic composition, symbiotic potential with creatures, and performance-enhancing seed pod compounds discovered. Lexi October claims competent oversight.
3307-01-14
Xenological Samples Delivered to Colonia
*Pilots Federation ALERT* The Holloway Bioscience Institute has rewarded pilots who delivered living matter extracted from space-dwelling organisms.
3305-12-11
Holloway Biology Centre Opens
The Holloway Biology Centre opens in the Colonia system after months of redesign. The state-of-the-art facility will study newly catalogued lifeforms discovered by the galactic community.
3305-02-14
Xeno Research Campaign Ends
The Holloway Bioscience Institute's campaign to build a xenological research centre concludes successfully, with sufficient materials and exploration data gathered to study new lifeforms identified via the Codex.
3305-02-07
Campaign for New Xeno Research Centre
Dr Roy Casimir of the Holloway Bioscience Institute requests cobalt, indium, tantalum and exploration data to construct a xenological research centre in the Nahuaru system.
